name: Mast Nano 2.0
shortDescription: Ultra-light, only 66-gram permanent makeup machine with coreless motor. Compact design, minimal noise and vibration – an especially great choice for eyelid work.
description:
The MAST Nano 2 is an ultra-light device designed for professional permanent makeup experts. At only 66 grams, it is one of the lightest machines on the market, yet it features a powerful coreless motor for dynamic and stable performance.

The slim, compact design is perfect for long work sessions, while minimal noise and vibration create an environment optimized for comfortable and precise work.

An excellent solution for both beginners and professionals, and an especially great choice for the eyelid area due to its small size and low weight.
metaTitle: MAST Nano 2 permanent makeup machine – Lightweight, quiet, and precise
metaDescription: 66 g compact permanent makeup machine for professional and beginner use. Minimal vibration, precise eyelid work, powerful and reliable performance.

featureRows.headline: Why do permanent makeup artists choose the Mast Nano 2?
featureRows.subtitle: The lightest machine that doesn't compromise on performance

features.title: Only 66 grams – the lightest in its category
features.description: The Mast Nano 2's extremely low weight is barely noticeable in the hand. The 18.8 mm diameter and 127.9 mm height provide a slim, pencil-like grip, which is especially important for precise work – such as eyeliner application.

features.title: Powerful coreless motor with minimal vibration
features.description: The 10,000 RPM coreless motor delivers dynamic and stable performance. The minimal noise and vibration not only serve the artist's comfort but also provide a more pleasant experience for the client on sensitive areas.

features.title: Especially ideal for eyelid work
features.description: Due to its small size and low weight, the Mast Nano 2 is one of the best choices for the eyelid area. The precise, vibration-free motor enables the accurate creation of hair-thin lines even on the most sensitive areas.

features.title: For beginners and professionals alike
features.description: The 2.7 mm fixed stroke length and 5–9V operating voltage range ensure simple operation. No need to deal with complicated settings – the Nano 2 is immediately ready to work and performs reliably in every situation.

training.headline: Permanent makeup device operator training
training.intro: Professional permanent makeup device operator training is available for the Mast Nano 2, provided within an officially registered adult education program.
items: Mast Nano 2 operating principles and optimal settings
Eyeliner techniques: thin and thicker line work
Hygiene protocols and sterile work practices
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn treatment techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate.
If you are interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to schedule an appointment!

testimonials.name: M. Vivien
testimonials.text: The Nano 2 is my absolute favorite for eyeliner! <mark>It's so light that I barely feel it in my hand, and because of that I can work much more precisely</mark>. The vibration is practically zero, which is vital in this area. Highly recommend!

expertQuote.quote: The Mast Nano 2 is the master of eyelid work. The combination of 66-gram weight and minimal vibration is unique in this price category.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: How does the Nano 2 differ from the MAST P60?
faq.answer: The Nano 2 is lighter (66 g vs 121 g), smaller, and more compact. It has a fixed 2.7 mm stroke length (the P60 has 5-level adjustable), and is corded (not battery-powered). The Nano 2 is specifically ideal for the eyelid area and precise, fine work, while the P60 is more versatile.

faq.question: What needle cartridges is it compatible with?
faq.answer: The Mast Nano 2 uses a universal cartridge system. It works excellently with MAST Oceanheart and WJX needle cartridges. For eyeliner, 1RL (0.18–0.25 mm) needle cartridges are ideal.

faq.question: Is the Nano 2 recommended for beginners?
faq.answer: Yes! The simple operation and fixed stroke length make learning easier. The light weight prevents hand fatigue during practice. The free training available with device purchase helps ensure a safe start.

faq.question: Can the Nano 2 only be used for eyelids?
faq.answer: No, the Nano 2 is suitable for all permanent makeup techniques – eyebrows, lips, eyelids. However, due to its small size and low weight, it is one of the best choices specifically for the eyelid area on the market.

faq.question: What warranty applies to the machine?
faq.answer: The Mast Nano 2 comes with a 1-year warranty. We provide a replacement device during repairs so your work doesn't stop.
